note: Boss taunt VO. Generated via ElevenLabs into src/assets/sounds/voice/boss/<boss>_<category>_<i>.mp3. Three distinct plan-available voices. boss_voice_system.gd plays them; boss_voice_data.gd mirrors the per-category counts for the runtime random-picker.

intro: Lil Blunt! Your gains are MY gains!
taunt: I'm auditing your soul, green boy!
Tax Form 420 says you owe... everything!
F-O-M-O won't save you from the I-R-S!
mock: That's a penalty for late payment!
hurt: Ow! That's assault on a federal agent!
phase50: Fine! We are escalating to a full audit!
phase25: This is highway robbery! MY robbery!
death: I'll see you... in tax court...

taunt: Diamond hands? I prefer diamond bones.

bandit.voice_note: Arnold — gruff, energetic; reads wild-west unhinged

taunt: I'm gonna blast you back to seed!
This minecart's got your name on it!
Fort Knox? More like Fort Knocked Out!
phase50: Now I'm angry! Off the rails we go!
phase25: Mega bomb time! Tick, tick, tick!
death: Ya blew it all up... good for you... greenhorn...
